nodes.name: Skema Aplikasi SPJ
nodes.label: Skema SPJ
nodes.description: Schema file defining the SPJ application's core features: data entry, file uploads, bukti fisik, workshop, dokumen wajib, realisasi dana BOSP, and PR pengadaan.

nodes.name: Plan Frontend Blueprint
nodes.label: Frontend Blueprint
nodes.description: Frontend blueprint for SPJ app using React + Vite + Tailwind CSS. Defines 9 routes, 8 sidebar menu items, page layouts, component hierarchy, template cards, UI state patterns, and PDF generation approach.

nodes.name: Perbandingan Teknologi SPJ
nodes.label: Tech Comparison
nodes.description: Technology comparison document analyzing options for SPJ app: Supabase Free→Pro, VPS+PostgreSQL, SQLite, Google Apps Script, Electron, File-Based JSON. Recommends Supabase Free Tier for blueprint.

nodes.name: Panduan Arsitektur Deploy Laravel SPJ
nodes.label: Architecture Guide
nodes.description: Architecture deployment guide for SPJ app using Laravel + SQLite, modeled after eRapor (local installation). Covers installer flow, database setup, Dapodik integration.

nodes.name: Riset Arsitektur Dapodik eRapor
nodes.label: Dapodik eRapor Research
nodes.description: Research document on Dapodik and eRapor architecture patterns, framework comparison, and integration approaches for school financial applications.

nodes.name: Login Authentication
nodes.label: Login Auth
nodes.description: Admin-only login with animated split layout. Form validation, loading state, error messages, smooth transition animations.

nodes.name: Pendataan Sekolah
nodes.label: Data Entry
nodes.description: Data entry for school profile and officials. Supports both manual form and Excel upload.

nodes.name: Upload Data
nodes.label: Excel Upload
nodes.description: Upload data profil sekolah and data guru via Excel (.xlsx) files. Drag & drop or browse file upload.

nodes.name: BKU Transaction Table
nodes.label: BKU Table
nodes.description: Excel-like BKU transaction table with columns for No, Tanggal, Uraian, Kode Rekening, Debet, Kredit, Saldo, Bukti, Aksi. Sort, filter, auto-calculate saldo.

nodes.name: Cetak Dokumen SPJ
nodes.label: Cetak Documents
nodes.description: Main document composition and printing page per BKU transaction. Split view with Card Grid, Document Editor, Document Preview. Footer actions for print and export.

nodes.name: Dokumen Wajib
nodes.label: Wajib Docs
nodes.description: Mandatory documents outside ARKAS. Toggle SIPLAH/non-SIPLAH controls which documents appear.

nodes.name: Realisasi Dana BOSP
nodes.label: Realisasi BOSP
nodes.description: Realization of BOSP funds with 3 tabs: Cover, Sekat, Alur. Auto-calculate selisih, export per tab to PDF.

nodes.name: Pengaturan Aplikasi
nodes.label: Settings
nodes.description: Application settings with 4 tabs: Profil Sekolah, Data Master, Backup & Restore, Tentang.

nodes.name: / (Landing Page)
nodes.label: Landing Route
nodes.description: Opening page with school branding, hero section, features section, info section, footer.

nodes.name: /login (Login)
nodes.label: Login Route
nodes.description: Admin-only login page with split layout: left = animated illustration, right = login form.

nodes.name: /dashboard (Dashboard)
nodes.label: Dashboard Route
nodes.description: Main dashboard with stats cards, recent BKU table, document progress bars.

nodes.name: /data-sekolah (Data Sekolah)
nodes.label: Data Sekolah Route
nodes.description: School data input page with Form/Upload tabs for profile and officials.

nodes.name: /data-guru (Data Guru)
nodes.label: Data Guru Route
nodes.description: Teacher and education staff data input page with Form/Upload tabs.

nodes.name: /bku (BKU)
nodes.label: BKU Route
nodes.description: BKU transaction table page with period filter, sort, auto-calculate saldo, print icon.

nodes.name: /bku/cetak/:id (Cetak)
nodes.label: Cetak Route
nodes.description: Dynamic route for document composition per BKU transaction.

nodes.name: /dokumen-wajib (Wajib)
nodes.label: Dokumen Wajib Route
nodes.description: Mandatory documents page with SIPLAH toggle and conditional document cards.

nodes.name: /realisasi (Realisasi)
nodes.label: Realisasi Route
nodes.description: Realization page with 3 tabs: Cover, Sekat, Alur.

nodes.name: /pengaturan (Pengaturan)
nodes.label: Pengaturan Route
nodes.description: Settings page with 4 tabs for profile, master data, backup, about.

nodes.name: LandingPage Components
nodes.label: Landing Page
nodes.description: Landing page components: LandingNavbar, HeroSection, FeaturesSection, InfoSection, Footer.

nodes.name: LoginPage Components
nodes.label: Login Page
nodes.description: Login page components: LoginIllustration, LoginForm, AppInfo.

nodes.name: DashboardPage Components
nodes.label: Dashboard Page
nodes.description: Dashboard components: StatsCards, RecentBKUTable, DocumentProgress.

nodes.name: DataSekolahPage Components
nodes.label: Data Sekolah Page
nodes.description: School data page components: DataSekolahForm, DataSekolahUpload, TabSwitcher.

nodes.name: DataGuruPage Components
nodes.label: Data Guru Page
nodes.description: Teacher data page components: DataGuruForm, DataGuruUpload, DataGuruTable.

nodes.name: BKUPage Components
nodes.label: BKU Page
nodes.description: BKU table page components: BKUTable, BKUFilter, BKUActions, PrintButton.

nodes.name: CetakPage Components
nodes.label: Cetak Page
nodes.description: Document composition page components: DocumentSidebar, DocumentCard, DocumentEditor, DocumentPreview, PreviewControls, PrintActions, BatchProcessor.

nodes.name: DokumenWajibPage Components
nodes.label: Dokumen Wajib Page
nodes.description: Mandatory documents page components: DokumenCard, UploadDokumen, SiplahToggle.

nodes.name: RealisasiPage Components
nodes.label: Realisasi Page
nodes.description: Realization page components: CoverForm, SekatTable, AlurFlow.

nodes.name: 17 BKU Utama Templates
nodes.label: 17 BKU Templates
nodes.description: 17 document templates for BKU transactions grouped into 7 gradient categories. Each template has card with gradient header, icon, title, sub-type, and action buttons.

nodes.name: 6 Dokumen Wajib Templates
nodes.label: 6 Wajib Templates
nodes.description: 6 mandatory document templates outside ARKAS: Dok. PBJ, Register KAS, Berita Acara, Lembar Kritik/Saran, Lembar Pengaduan, Papan BOS.

nodes.name: 3 Realisasi Templates
nodes.label: 3 Realisasi Templates
nodes.description: 3 realization document templates: Cover, Sekat, Alur. Tab-based navigation.

nodes.name: State Management
nodes.label: State Management
nodes.description: React Context / Zustand for lightweight state management. State sections: documents, dokumenWajib, realisasi, ui.

nodes.name: UI State Patterns
nodes.label: UI Patterns
nodes.description: Reusable UI patterns: Empty State, Loading State, Error State, Confirmation Dialog, Toast Notification.

nodes.name: Card-Based Premium Design
nodes.label: Card Design System
nodes.description: Premium card design system with gradient headers, rounded-2xl shadow, hover effects, status indicators, action buttons. 3 card variants.

nodes.name: Sidebar Navigation
nodes.label: Sidebar Navigation
nodes.description: Sidebar with 8 menu items: Dashboard, Data Sekolah, Data Guru, BKU, Dokumen SPJ, Dokumen Wajib, Realisasi, Pengaturan.

nodes.name: 9+ Bukti Fisik Categories
nodes.label: Bukti Fisik
nodes.description: Physical evidence categories: Honor, Perjalanan Dinas, Mamin, Penggandaan, Cetak Foto, Cetak Banner, Sewa, Pemeliharaan, Tagihan.
